---
title: "Diagnostic Review and Analytical Opportunities"
author:
  - name: "Renato Vargas"
    id: rv
    affiliation: 
      - name: "Consultant for The World Bank"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
---

# Introduction

The System of Environmental Economic Accounting (SEEA) [@european_commission_system_2013] is the international statistical standard for measuring the environment and its relationship with the economy.
